title: LeoTweaks Nether
description: The perfect pack for Netherite mining. Comes with other helpful Nether utility such as Soulsand Visibility and Nether Portal Transparency. Never miss Ancient Debris again!
body:
**Adds an outline to Ancient Debris and halves netherrack mining particles to make Netherite mining easier.**

---

Additionally:
- Nether Portals become more transparent to allow seeing what's behind them
- Netherwart gets a more visual last stage to know when to harvest them
- Soulsand Valleys are easier to traverse due to clearer Soul Sand and Soul Soil distinction.
- Netherrack is brighter.
- Quartz and Nether Gold Ore get an outline.
